calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion Re Default (Prove-Up Hearing)
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant River Accelerator LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Charlene Padovani Kiesselbach. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Dhaivat H. Shah, Esq. of Grellas Shah, LLP appeared for plaintiff Sinwaves, Inc.
Tomothy Menard, Chief Executive Officer and witness for plaintiff Sinwaves, Inc was also present.
Both Messrs appeared via ZOOM Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant River Accelerator LLC.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Declaratory Relief; Recission and Restitution was filed on December 3, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant River Accelerator LLC occurred on December 16, 2019, and was effectuated on December 26, 2019.
Default was entered as on defendant River Accelerator LLC on June 4, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed without prejudice on June 4, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sinwaves, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant River Accelerator LLC, as follows:

Attorney Fees - $9,140.00.
Costs - $720.50.

Total - $9,860.50.

Additionally, Declaratory Judgment that the "Our Bet On You Agreement" between plaintiff Sinwaves, Inc., and defendant River Accelerator LLC is void and unenforceable or rescinded.

The Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
